title: Add info button shell
summary: Plan accurately reflects a complete, working implementation. All source files exist as described, all 27 tests pass, TypeScript compiles with zero errors, and every acceptance criterion is verifiably met.

criteria_verification.verified: createInfoButton() in src/ui/infoOverlay.ts:11 creates a fixed-position button; CSS confirms position:fixed, z-index:10, bottom-right placement.
Click handler calls showOverlay() setting display:flex. Test 'clicking info button shows the overlay' confirms.
Three close paths (close button, Escape, backdrop click) all toggle display:none. Test confirms window.location is never accessed.

criteria_verification.criterion: Overlay works on desktop and mobile
criteria_verification.verified: 44px min tap targets on both button and close button. Panel uses width:90%/max-width:28rem for responsive layout. prefers-reduced-motion media query disables transitions.

remaining_steps.description: All acceptance criteria are met. Update ticket status to reflect implementation is complete.
